roundup.title: Nemotron 3 Ultra & Gemma 4 12B Lead Open Model Wave
roundup.subtitle: 开源550B MoE与12B多模态模型同步落地，Agent推理栈全面升级
headline: @vllm_project 与 @PrimeIntellect 率先宣布 Nemotron 3 Ultra Day-0 支持，550B/55B MoE 模型专为长上下文 Agent 设计，@nvidia 强调其 Hybrid Transformer-Mamba 架构可显著提升 orchestration 性能。
@googledevs 与 @demishassabis 同步发布 Gemma 4 12B，Apache 2.0 开源权重可在笔记本本地运行，@sundarpichai 指出该模型在尺寸与多步推理、agentic workflow 之间取得新平衡。
@AnthropicAI 官方博客讨论 Claude 递归自改进趋势，@alexalbert__ 披露超过 80% Anthropic 代码已由 Claude 撰写，@kimmonismus 总结其 SWE-bench 与任务时长指标持续翻倍。
@cursor_ai 推出上下文使用交互报告与 Design Mode，@LangChain 发布 LangSmith Fleet 无代码 Agent 构建工具，生产级 Agent 开发门槛进一步降低。

deepDives.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra 开源发布
deepDives.summary: NVIDIA 推出 550B 参数混合 MoE 模型，专为长时运行 Agent 优化，vLLM 与 Prime Intellect 首发支持。

facts.text: Nemotron 3 Ultra 采用 Hybrid Transformer-Mamba MoE 架构，总参数 550B，激活 55B。
facts.quote: 550B total / 55B active — Hybrid Transformer-Mamba MoE, up to 1M token context

facts.text: 官方宣称吞吐量较同类开源模型高 5 倍，成本降低最多 30%。
facts.quote: 5x higher throughput vs. other open models in its class 💸 Up to 30% lower c

facts.text: 支持 tool calling、coding、deep research 与 orchestration 等 Agent 场景。

bullish.text: 能力/效率比极高，值得直接部署测试
Day-0 支持 RL 训练栈，加速开源 agentic 能力

deepDives.title: Gemma 4 12B 本地多模态模型发布
deepDives.summary: Google 发布 12B 开源多模态模型，支持笔记本本地运行与 agentic workflow。

facts.text: Gemma 4 12B 为 encoder-free 统一模型，可在 16GB VRAM 笔记本上运行。
facts.quote: it's a super capable open weights model that can run directly on your laptop

facts.text: Apache 2.0 许可，支持多步推理与 agentic workflows。
facts.quote: enabling powerful multi-step reasoning and agentic workflows

bullish.text: 尺寸与性能平衡极佳，本地 Agent 首选

bullets.text: LangSmith Fleet 支持自然语言创建 Agent，降低生产部署门槛。
Cursor 推出上下文使用交互报告与 Design Mode，提升 coding agent 调试效率。
LangGraph 内置重试、超时与错误处理原语，增强长时 Agent 可靠性。
Gemma 4 12B 在本地设备即可实现多步推理与 agentic 能力。
Nemotron 3 Ultra 在 vLLM 上实现 Day-0 推理优化。
Anthropic 内部数据显示 Claude 已撰写超过 80% 代码库。
bullets.quote: Over 80% of all code merged into our codebase is now written by Claude

bullets.text: OpenAI 模型发现 80 年 Erdős 猜想反例，展示 AI 辅助数学研究。

topTweets.whyItMatters: 开源 RL 栈与新模型结合，加速 agentic 训练

takeaways: Nemotron 3 Ultra 与 Gemma 4 12B 同日发布，标志开源模型在 Agent 推理与本地部署上同时突破。
vLLM 与 Prime Intellect 的 Day-0 支持显示推理与 RL 基础设施已做好准备。
Anthropic 内部 80% 代码由 Claude 生成，验证递归自改进的实际进展。
Cursor 与 LangSmith 新工具持续降低生产级 Agent 构建与调试成本。
Perplexity $25M Accelerator 与 400+ 工具集成，显示商业 Agent 应用加速落地。

items.author: @PrimeIntellect
items.text: We're excited to join the NVIDIA Nemotron Coalition 💚 ... NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra is here We have Day‑0 support for Nemotron 3 Ultra in prime-rl and Lab.
items.whyItMatters: Nemotron 3 Ultra Day-0 支持，强化开源 agent RL 栈

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: None of this guarantees recursive self-improvement is on the horizon. It’s not yet clear that Claude is capable of research judgment—of choosing the right problems to work on. But if these trends continue, AI systems designing and building their own successors is plausible. This could revolutionize society—medicine, te
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic官方详解Claude递归自改进趋势与对齐风险，含多项benchmark数据

items.author: @kimmonismus
items.text: Holy moly, Anthropic is getting very serious about recursive self-improvement! One word: acceleration. Insane blog article. Tl;dr: •We are close to an AI capable of fully autonomously designing and building its own successor •Anthropic engineers now ship on average 8x as much code... Claude authored 80%+ of code...
items.whyItMatters: 总结Anthropic自改进博客，含SWE-bench、任务时长翻倍等关键指标

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: What happened when one of our models found a counterexample to an 80-year-old Erdős conjecture? Researchers shared the story on the OpenAI Podcast... how mathematicians and models can work together to make new discoveries.
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI模型破解80年数学猜想，展示AI辅助科研新范式

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: Cursor can now show your agent's context usage as an interactive report in a canvas. The context explorer breaks down where tokens go across the system prompt, tool definitions, rules, skills, and more. Design Mode is now available in canvases.
items.whyItMatters: Cursor新增上下文可视化与Design Mode，提升AI coding agent调试效率

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: 🚀 Day-0 support for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra on vLLM! 550B total / 55B active — Hybrid Transformer-Mamba MoE, up to 1M token context, tool calling, coding, deep research, orchestration.
items.whyItMatters: vLLM首发支持550B MoE新模型，优化长上下文agent推理性能

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: With LangSmith Fleet, you can start creating agents using every day language. Enroll in our LangChain Academy Quickstart course to learn how to build no-code agents for real work.
items.whyItMatters: LangSmith推出无代码agent构建工具，加速生产级agent开发

items.author: @NousResearch
items.text: Hermes Agent gives you superpowers
items.whyItMatters: Nous Hermes Agent 发布，提升 Agent 能力

items.author: @eliebakouch
items.text: NVIDIA 💚🦋 Prime Intellect We're excited to join the NVIDIA Nemotron Coalition 💚 Frontier open models matter... bringing the RL infrastructure and environments... to help scale agentic capabilities.
items.whyItMatters: Prime Intellect 加入 NVIDIA 联盟，扩展 Agentic RL

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: Today we're launching the Main Street AI Accelerator with the U.S. Small Business Administration. We're committing $25M in Computer credits, $250 each for up to 100,000 eligible companies...
items.whyItMatters: Perplexity 推 $25M AI Accelerator，支持中小企业 Agent

items.author: @AravSrinivas
items.text: We’re bringing all connectors required to spin up and run a business from scratch inside Perplexity Computer. It’s going to be possible for anyone with an idea... to build fast growing valuable companies faster than ever before with Computer.
items.whyItMatters: Perplexity Computer 集成 400+ 工具，加速业务构建

items.author: @ollama
items.text: ollama run gemma4:12b Gemma 4 12B is updated on Ollama, and available across all platforms! Try it on: Claude Code, Hermes Agent, OpenClaw, Codex...
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 12B 上线 Ollama，支持多 Agent 平台

items.author: @sydneyrunkle
items.text: lots of things can go wrong when you have long running agents, including model/tool call failures and rate limits langgraph's agent runtime builds in primitives for retries, timeouts, and general purpose error handlers...
items.whyItMatters: LangGraph Agent runtime 内置重试/超时处理

items.author: @alexalbert__
items.text: We just published internal data on how much of Claude's development is already being done by Claude: Over 80% of all code merged into our codebase is now written by Claude. It's been months since many researchers at Anthropic hand-wrote code. The typical Anthropic engineer ships 8x as much code as they did in 2024. On
items.whyItMatters: Claude 已写 80%+ Anthropic 代码，工程师产出 8x，AI coding 能力实测数据。

items.author: @baseten
items.text: Are you tired of waiting 17 minutes for an AI agent to finish a code change? ... Nemotron 3 Ultra addresses this with a hybrid architecture that replaces several attention-heavy layers with Mamba layers. This makes long-context inference far more efficient. ... up to 5x higher throughput, up to 30% lower cost.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra 用 Mamba 混合架构，agent 长上下文推理 5x 更快、成本降 30%。

items.author: @rasbt
items.text: And another open-weight release. Nemotron 3 Ultra has an ultra impressive capability:efficiency ratio! Design-wise, it carries forward the Mamba-2-attention hybrid stack and LatentMoE introduced in the previous Super variant. But everything is a bit bigger.
items.whyItMatters: 开源 Nemotron 3 Ultra 发布，Mamba-2 + LatentMoE 混合架构，能力/效率比突出。

items.author: @cwolferesearch
items.text: Interesting experiment that compares summary-based, sliding window, and append-only compaction strategies in LLM agents. When training smaller agents on GSM8K with GRPO, sliding window compaction performs best... evaluating compaction techniques is both difficult and essential.
items.whyItMatters: LLM agent 上下文压缩策略实验：sliding window 在 GRPO 训练中表现最佳，对长 horizon 任务关键。

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: New course on serving LLMs efficiently -- how do you serve models to many concurrent users at low latency and reasonable cost? This short course is built with @RedHat and taught by @cedricclyburn. Efficient LLM serving requires efficient memory management. ... Join and learn to serve LLMs efficiently:
items.whyItMatters: vLLM+量化实用部署教程，AI工程师必学

items.author: @JeffDean
items.text: Check out our Gemma 4 12B model: it's a super capable open weights model that can run directly on your laptop.
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 12B 开源多模态模型发布，可本地运行

items.author: @danielhanchen
items.text: Nemotron-3-Ultra is out! It's NVIDIA's strongest open model ever! We did KLD benchmarks for our Unsloth GGUFs, and they do well even at dynamic 1bit (190GB disk space) Nemotron was pretrained with NVFP4 & uses the new OpenMDW license.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA 550B 开源模型+GGUF量化基准，性能领先

items.author: @googledevs
items.text: Agent development is moving forward. While production scaling traditionally required manual infrastructure setup and provisioning sandboxes from scratch, there's now a faster path. Managed Agents in the Gemini API are officially live. Get maximum agentic power with zero infrastructure overhead. One simple API call deli
items.whyItMatters: Gemini API 托管 Agent 上线，AI 工程师无需自建 infra 即可快速构建生产级 Agent。

items.author: @fal
items.text: Sonilo v1.1 is live on fal. A professionally licensed video-to-music AI model from @Sonilo_music that generates original soundtracks directly from your footage in seconds. Upload a video, get music that matches its pacing, emotion, and story instantly.
items.whyItMatters: 专业授权视频转音乐模型 v1.1 上线 fal API，生成式媒体工具链新增实用能力。

items.author: @benhylak
items.text: made with❤️ try it below and let me know what you think :) (raindrop_ai major release)
items.whyItMatters: Raindrop AI 重大产品发布，设计师构建 AI 工具的实际案例与用户反馈。

items.author: @julien_c
items.text: Today I'm launching a new project called SynthTraces 🔥 It is a minimal codebase to generate synthetic coding agent session traces using Pi (from @badlogicgames) ... everything is published on @huggingface ✅
items.whyItMatters: 开源合成 coding agent traces 数据集，助力 agent 训练

items.author: @LangChain_OSS
items.text: One of the most common questions we get from agent builders is how to make agents resilient to failures, so we wrote a guide!
items.whyItMatters: LangChain 发布 agent 容错指南，提升生产可靠性

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: Back at it. @_soyr_ and the team got Nemotron 3 Ultra running on @vllm_project day 0... Gemma 4 12B dropped today. Apache 2.0, multimodal... Running on Red Hat OpenShift AI with @vllm_project on Day 0
items.whyItMatters: vLLM/OpenShift Day-0 支持新模型，加速推理部署

items.author: @joshwoodward
items.text: Love this Gemini feature on my macOS app! Right now, you can just install it direct. Get it here: https://gemini.google/mac/
items.whyItMatters: Gemini macOS App 新功能，支持屏幕上下文

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: The edits you need, made easy. Aleph 2.0 changes just what you want edited, leaving the rest of your shot untouched. Try it in our new Edit Studio.
items.whyItMatters: Runway Aleph 2.0 精准视频编辑，AI 视频工具升级

items.author: @wandb
items.text: The @nvidia Nemotron 3 Ultra is live on CW Serverless Inference 🚀 Open, frontier-reasoning, built for long-running agents — 550B params (55B active), hybrid Transformer-Mamba MoE, up to 1M context. For orchestration, coding agents & deep research.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA 新开源 MoE 模型上线，支持长上下文 Agent 任务

items.author: @wandb
items.text: This AI agent just proposed a new treatment for blindness. Not a summary but a real hypothesis, validated in the lab and published in Nature a few days ago. And this is just one of the 20,000 novel scientific findings @SGRodriques's AI scientist Kosmos has generated.
items.whyItMatters: AI 科学家系统已产出真实可验证的科研发现

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: Play our new open-weights music model, @GoogleMagenta RealTime 2, using a MIDI keyboard, live text prompts, and even hand gestures ✌️

items.text: NEW: Spiral 4.0—a writing partner for you and your agent by @every -> Stylometry: new Style Engine... -> MCP and CLI: Spiral is now built to be used by your agent like Codex, Claude Code...

items.author: @BoWang87
items.text: @UHN is one of the best hospitals in the world at harnessing AI to improve people’s lives. UHN was the first hospital in Canada to appoint a Chief AI Scientist... work has been recognized globally, including MedSAM, scGPT, MedRAX...
items.whyItMatters: 医疗 AI 模型与医院部署实践分享

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text: 🚨 BREAKING: @NVIDIAAI just dropped Nemotron 3 Ultra — a fully open 550B Mixture-of-Experts model (55B active) built for long-running agents. ⚡ 5x higher throughput vs. other open models in its class 💸 Up to 30% lower cost to task completion 🧠 Frontier reasoning + orchestration, 95% on RULER @1M context 🔓 Open weigh
items.whyItMatters: 开源550B MoE新模型，agent推理性能与成本具体数据，AI工程师可直接部署测试。

items.author: @Grad62304977
items.text: In general RL seems to have a very different batch size scaling than pretraining Also even in their previous shorter context stages, the batch sizes were always bigger or equal to the pretraining batch size
items.whyItMatters: RL vs pretraining批大小scaling差异讨论，对训练优化有实用参考价值。

items.author: @hxiao
items.text: I think memory today is like the pre-transformer ai era where so many methods r exploring and we haven’t found that one paradigm yet - what’s the “transformer” for memory
items.whyItMatters: AI memory系统范式探索，类比Transformer前时代，对下一代架构有启发。

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: Physical AI needs to understand the world before it can act in it. Introducing Cosmos 3, the open world foundation model and the first omni-model for physical AI. It understands and generates across text, image, video, sound and action... #1 open model on public leaderboards...
items.whyItMatters: 开源物理AI基础模型，32B/8B变体，支持机器人与视觉代理。

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: AI compute demand isn't slowing down... AI Clouds are built on NVIDIA’s full-stack... powered by NVIDIA Vera Rubin is already in motion. The global buildout is underway.
items.whyItMatters: 全球AI云基础设施扩张，Vera Rubin下一代平台信号。

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text: how I’m building an agent company inside my agency. Agency gBrain → Orchestrator Hermes Agent → Department verticals → Specialist agents → Scoped sub-agents. I use different harnesses: Hermes Agent, Codex, Claude Code. Narrow scope improves output quality...
items.whyItMatters: 实战Agent公司架构与harness选择，AI工程师可直接借鉴

items.author: @skalskip92
items.text: curated and subjective list of top CVPR 2026 papers: https://github.com/SkalskiP/top-cvpr-2026-papers

items.author: @saranormous
items.text: Congrats team @chaidiscovery — a team that is not only training AI models to accelerate science, but rapidly deploying them with the leading pharma companies... Chai-3
items.whyItMatters: AI药物发现平台与Pfizer合作落地，行业应用信号

items.author: @hwchase17
items.text: langchain create_agent is a super minimal agent harness very easy to customize with... middleware!!! as you build task-specific harnesses, great to know - check it out below!
items.whyItMatters: LangChain 极简 Agent harness，支持 middleware 定制

items.author: @demishassabis
items.text: Celebrating the milestone of a massive 150+ million downloads of Gemma 4 with the release of the new Gemma 4 12B model! It's incredibly powerful for such a small model and it’s tiny enough to run locally on a laptop with just 16GB VRAM. Apache 2.0 license - happy building!
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 12B 发布：本地 16GB VRAM 运行，多步推理+agentic 能力，开源 Apache 2.0。

items.author: @sundarpichai
items.text: Our new Gemma 4 12B model hits a sweet spot between size + performance: it can run locally on a laptop, while enabling powerful multi-step reasoning and agentic workflows. Can’t wait to see what the community does with this one!
items.whyItMatters: Google 官方确认 Gemma 4 12B 支持本地+agentic workflow，性能/尺寸平衡新标杆。

items.author: @HamelHusain
items.text: Our evals course is 25% off this week! The next cohort will have completely refreshed material. @sh_reya and I will cover new topics like: using agents for evals (w/o the foot guns), thinking like a data scientist, optimization approaches for harnesses and more.
items.whyItMatters: Agent evals与harness优化新课程，实用技能升级

items.author: @kellerjordan0
items.text: Modded-NanoGPT optimization result #29 (2026/05/14): @eliebakouch has achieved a new step-count record of 2930 via the following techniques: Add Aurora to mlp.proj, Warmup & cooldown Muon mu...
items.whyItMatters: NanoGPT 优化新纪录，揭示 Muon 等训练技巧

items.author: @__tinygrad__
items.text: Because it's the full stack from Tensors to MMIO, the ceiling on speed in tinygrad is higher than in any other framework.
items.whyItMatters: tinygrad 全栈 GPU 框架在推理速度上的优势

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: We’re launching Gemma 4 12B: Our unified, encoder-free model that brings powerful multimodal intelligence straight to your laptop 🚀 The model bridges the gap between our mobile E4B model and larger 26B MoE models, packaging frontier-class reasoning and native audio into a highly optimized footprint, all under a permis
items.whyItMatters: 新开源多模态模型，支持本地运行与多 runtime 兼容

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: @dan_aai is running a live workshop on building a voice agent with Claude Code on June 10 at 10am PT. You'll walk away with: Starter code... A working agent...
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code 构建语音 Agent 实战 workshop

items.author: @OpenAINewsroom
items.text: There’s real momentum right now for AI safety policy. Yesterday’s EO on cyber was an important step forward. We’re proposing a set of ideas for policymakers...
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI发布前沿安全政策蓝图，推动监管透明。

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text: the difference between open and closed research agents... open: wide tools + skills like /last30days; closed: scoped to 50 profiles, scheduled niche reports. Applies to any marketing verticals.
items.whyItMatters: 开放vs封闭Agent设计对比，指导workflow构建

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text: new: branching create an instant, copy-on-write clone of a tpuf namespace → constant-time (440ms p50, ~1s p99) → fully independent → unlimited branches, unlimited branch depth docs: https://turbopuffer.com/docs/branching

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text: Just now from @satyanadella at Microsoft Build keynote : over 11,000 models are available in Microsoft Foundry Super proud to contribute to it - @huggingface provides 10,928 of those!

items.author: @jaminball
items.text: BTW - Jensen said this week the cost to develop 1GW may rise to $80-$100b In this article I talked about the cost to develop 1GW being closer to $50b, and an industry that could add 150gw over next ~5 years...

items.whyItMatters: Codex用户破500万，扩展至知识工作生产力工具。

items.text: LET’SS go! (quoting adaption_ai: Beyond text. Beyond static data. Today, Adaptive Data is now multimodal. Bringing advanced data optimization to image datasets.)
items.whyItMatters: 多模态数据优化新进展，影响下一代模型训练

items.author: @threepointone
items.text: I got a repro of a bug from a user that only shows up in prod, and for the last hour+ 4.8 has been chugging away isolating the root cause, with repeated changes and deploys and reading the logs, and it’s been amazing to watch. Now it’s formulating a workaround so I can unblock the user, and has a standalone repro for m
items.whyItMatters: 展示 LLM Agent 在生产调试中的实际应用价值

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text: tpuf quantizes vectors to improve perf (RaBitQ) the algo randomly rotates vectors, and we were using matmul at O(d²) space & time, brutal at high dims. 10k = 400MB in RAM! we rebuilt the rotation using FWHT at O(d) space & O(d log d) time. ~no recall loss, 10k = only 5kB in RAM
items.whyItMatters: 优化高维向量量化，显著降低 AI 推理内存占用
